title: cardamine californica
intro: Cardamine californica, also known as California bittercress, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States and parts of Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as treating digestive issues, lowering blood pressure, and providing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to address a range of health concerns.
